en.question: Venn for: Males, Fathers, Brothers?
en.explanation: All fathers and brothers are males. They can overlap. Two intersecting circles inside larger circle.

hi.question: पुरुष, पिता, भाई के लिए वेन आरेख?
hi.explanation: पिता-भाई पुरुषों के उपसमुच्चय, काट सकते हैं।

en.question: 80 students, 40 cricket, 30 football, 20 both. How many play neither?
200 surveyed, 120 tea, 90 coffee, 50 both. Only tea?
Venn for: Mothers, Women, Engineers?
en.explanation: All mothers are women. Some women/mothers are engineers. Mothers inside Women, Engineers overlapping both.

hi.question: माताएँ, महिलाएँ, इंजीनियर। वेन आरेख?
hi.explanation: माताएँ ⊆ महिलाएँ, इंजीनियर दोनों को काटता है।

en.question: 150 surveyed, 80 tea, 70 coffee, 50 both. Only tea?
100 people, 60 Hindi, 50 English, 30 both. Exactly one language?
en.explanation: Only Hindi=30, Only English=20. Exactly one=50.

en.question: 200 Math, 180 Physics, 220 Chem. M&P=100, P&C=80, M&C=120, all3=60, none=20. Total?

hi.question: गणित 200, भौतिकी 180, रसायन 220, सभी ओवरलैप सहित, कुल?

en.question: Venn for: Cars, Vehicles, Wheels?
en.explanation: All cars are vehicles. Vehicles have wheels. Cars ⊂ Vehicles, Wheels overlaps.

hi.question: कार, वाहन, पहिए। वेन आरेख?
hi.explanation: सभी कारें वाहन हैं। वाहनों के पहिए होते हैं।
